messages.content: you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words: Úrad mal za spoľahlivo zistené, že prevádzkovateľ zaslaním Uznesenia, bez primeraných technických opatrení, ako je napríklad pseudonyrnizácia s cieľom chrániť práva dotknutých osôb, sprístupnil osobné údaje všetkých 47 majiteľov garáži v postavení dotknutých osôb vrátane navrhovateľa, a to v rozsahu meno, priezvisko, rodné priezvisko, dátum narodenia, adresa bydliska, bez primeraného právneho základu v zmysle čl. 6 ods. 1 GDPR, čím porušil zásadu zákonnosti v zmysle čl. 5 ods. 1 písm. a) Nariadenia.

The Office had reliably established that the Controller, by sending the Resolution without appropriate technical measures such as pseudonymization to protect the rights of those concerned, has made personal data of all 47 garage owners available to those concerned, including the petitioner, in form of first name, last name, maiden name, date of birth, address of residence, without appropriate legal basis in accordance with Article 6 (1) GDPR, thereby violating the principle of legality pursuant to Article 5 (1) (a) of the Regulation.
improve the translation please

The Office has found, with reliable evidence, that the Controller, by sending the Resolution without adequate technical measures such as pseudonymization to protect the rights of data subjects, has made personal data of all 47 garage owners, including the petitioner, available in the form of their first name, last name, maiden name, date of birth, and address of residence, without appropriate legal grounds in accordance with Article 6 (1) GDPR, thus violating the principle of legality as defined in Article 5 (1) (a) of the Regulation.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:  Aj keď prevádzkovateľ označil túto udalosť za jednorazové zlyhanie ľudského faktora, sprístupnenie osobných údajov dotknutých osôb sa považuje za neprimeraný zásah do ich práv a slobôd. Takéto sprístupnenie vedie k strate kontroly nad spracúvaním osobných údajov, čo je nezvratný stav, nezlučiteľný s požiadavkami GDPR.

Although the Controller has labeled this incident as a one-time failure of human factor, the disclosure of personal data of those concerned is considered an inappropriate intrusion into their rights and freedoms. Such a disclosure leads to a loss of control over the processing of personal data, which is an irreversible situation incompatible with the requirements of the GDPR.
improve the translation

While the Controller has characterized this event as a one-off mistake caused by human error, the disclosure of personal data of the data subjects is regarded as an undue intrusion into their rights and freedoms. Such disclosure leads to a loss of control over the processing of personal data, which is an irreversible and incompatible situation with the requirements of the GDPR.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:

Právo dotknutých osôb na kontrolu nad spracúvaním ich osobných údajov je jedným z hlavných práv, ktoré prevádzkovateľ musí rešpektovať počas celej doby spracúvania. Zodpovednosť za zaistenie bezpečnosti spracúvania osobných údajov nesie prevádzkovateľ.

Prevádzkovateľ je povinný splniť všetky požiadavky GDPR a zabezpečiť ich dodržiavanie. Úrad vo vyšetrovacom procese zistil, že prevádzkovateľ tieto povinnosti nedodržal.

The right of data subjects to control the processing of their personal data is one of the main rights that the Controller must respect throughout the processing period. The Controller bears the responsibility for ensuring the security of personal data processing.

The Controller is obliged to comply with all GDPR requirements and ensure their proper enforcement. The Office has found, during the investigative process, that the Controller failed to fulfill these obligations.
improve the translation

The right of data subjects to have control over the processing of their personal data is one of the principal rights that the Controller must uphold throughout the entire processing period. It is the sole responsibility of the Controller to ensure the security and safety of personal information being processed.

To comply with all GDPR requirements and to ensure strict enforcement of its provisions, the Controller has an obligation. During the investigative process, the Office has determined that the Controller failed to observe these responsibilities.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:
Úrad napokon rozhodol o uložení pokuty prevádzkovateľovi vo výške 2.200,- EUR za porušenie zákona o ochrane osobných údajov a GDPR, keďže jeho konanie porušilo zásadu zákonnosti v oblasti ochrany osobných údajov. Prevádzkovateľ však dobrovoľne prijal opatrenia na zabránenie opakovania porušenia a zamestnankyňa, ktorá nesprávne sprístupnila osobné údaje, bola preškolená o právach a povinnostiach týkajúcich sa spracúvania osobných údajov. Úrad preto nepovažoval za potrebné uložiť dodatočné opatrenia na nápravu.

Finally, the Office decided to impose a fine of 2,200 EUR on the Controller for violating the Data Protection Act and the GDPR, as its actions violated the principle of legality in terms of personal data protection. However, the Controller voluntarily took measures to prevent recurrence of such breaches, and the employee who had improperly disclosed the personal data was retrained on the rights and obligations of personal data processing. Therefore, the Office did not deem it necessary to impose any further corrective measures.
improve the translation

Ultimately, the Office has decided to impose a penalty of 2,200 EUR on the Controller for violating the Data Protection Act and the GDPR, as its actions contravened the principle of legality relating to the protection of personal data. However, the Controller willingly instituted measures to prevent the recurrence of such breaches, and the worker who had erroneously disclosed personal data was retrained on the rights and duties of processing personal data. Consequently, the Office found it unnecessary to enforce any other corrective measures.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:
Pri rozhodovaní o uložení pokuty a určení jej výšky Úrad zohľadnil viacero faktorov. Ako priťažujúca okolnosť bola vyhodnotená povaha a závažnosť porušenia, kedy bolo zistené porušenie základnej zásady spracúvania, za ktoré možno uložiť pokutu až do 20.000.000 EUR a počet dotknutých osôb. Poľahčujúcimi okolnosťami bol neúmyselný charakter porušenia, kategória osobných údajov, ktorých sa porušenie týka (bežné údaje) a skutočnosť, že porušením GDPR prevádzkovateľ nezískal žiaden finančný prípadne nefinančný prospech. Úrad ako poľahčujúcu okolnosť zohľadnil aj skutočnosť, že prevádzkovateľ porušenie oznámil Úradu akoporušenie ochrany osobných údajov.

When deciding on the imposition and the amount of the fine, the Office considered several factors. As an aggravating circumstance, the nature and seriousness of the breach was evaluated, whereby a violation of the basic principle of personal data processing was discovered, for which a fine can be imposed up to 20,000,000 EUR, as well as the number of data subjects affected. Mitigating factors included the unintentional nature of the breach, the category of personal data involved (ordinary data), and the fact that the Controller did not obtain any financial or non-financial gain from the GDPR breach. As a further mitigating circumstance, the Office took into account the fact that the Controller reported the breach to the Office as a violation of personal data protection.
improve the translation

When deciding on the imposition and amount of the fine, the Office considered several factors. The nature and severity of the breach was evaluated as an aggravating circumstance, as a violation of the basic principle of personal data processing was discovered. Such a breach could result in a fine of up to 20,000,000 EUR, as well as the number of data subjects affected. Mitigating factors included the unintentional nature of the breach, the category of personal data involved (ordinary data), and the fact that the Controller did not obtain any financial or non-financial gain from the GDPR breach. Additionally, the fact that the Controller reported the breach to the Office as a violation of personal data protection was also taken into account as a mitigating circumstance.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:
Právo dotknutých osôb na kontrolu nad spracúvaním ich osobných údajov je jedným z hlavných práv, ktoré prevádzkovateľ musí rešpektovať počas celej doby spracúvania. Zodpovednosť za zaistenie bezpečnosti spracúvania osobných údajov nesie prevádzkovateľ.

The right of data subjects to have control over the processing of their personal data is one of the main rights that the Controller must respect throughout the entire processing period. The responsibility for ensuring the security of personal data processing lies entirely with the Controller.
improve

Data subjects have the fundamental right to control the processing of their personal data, which the Controller must respect throughout the entire duration of the processing. It is the Controller's sole responsibility to ensure the security of personal data processing.

you will be transferring article from slovak to english, you will translate “prevádzkovateľ” and its forms as “Controller” and you will translate “sprostredkovateľ” and its forms as “processor”, keep the structure of text, use correct tense and words:
 Porušenie ochrany osobných údajov zo strany mesta Trnava ako prevádzkovateľa osobných údajov
Violation of personal data protection by the City of Trnava as the Controller of personal data.

hey gpt, imagine that you have huge amount of documents in folder, now you have algorithm that can search through all these documents, your task is to find all personal data defined by GDPR in those documents, so you will have to write into the script all the key words by whose you will find those personal data, now you will write those key words in slovak and you will write basic form of it, example "priezvisko" instead of it you will add key word "priezvisk" so it can find priezvisk, priezviská, priezviskom, etc. by this principle work with all key words, write as many as you can

Sure, I can provide you with the list of keywords for finding personal data defined by GDPR in Slovak. Here are some examples along with their basic forms:

- Meno (Name)
- Priezvisk (Surname)
- Titul (Title)
- Rodné priezvisk (Maiden name)
- Adresa (Address)
- E-mail (Email)
- Telefón (Phone number)
- Mobil (Mobile number)
- Číslo účtu (Bank account number)
- ICO/IČO (Identification number of legal entity)
- RČ/RČO (Identification number of natural person)
- Pas (Passport)
- Občiansky preukaz (ID card)
- Sociálne zabezpečenie (Social security number)
- Dátum narodenia (Date of birth)
- Miesto narodenia (Place of birth)
- Štátna príslušnosť (Nationality)
- Fotografia/Foto (Photograph/Photo)
- Osobné číslo (Personal identification number)

Note that this is not a comprehensive list, and there may be additional keywords or variations of those mentioned above that should be considered when searching for personal data in documents.
expand the list, write all key words you can

Sure, here is a more comprehensive list of keywords in Slovak for finding personal data defined by GDPR:

- Meno (Name)
- Zdrobneniny mena (Nickname/Shortened name)

- ICO/IČO (Identification number of legal entity)
- DIČ (Identification number for VAT)
- IČ DPH (Identification number for VAT payer)
- RČ/RČO (Identification number of natural person)

- Pracovná zmluva (Employment contract)
- Dátum narodenia (Date of birth)
- Miesto narodenia (Place of birth)
- Štátna príslušnosť (Nationality)
- Fotografia/Foto (Photograph/Photo)
- Osobné číslo (Personal identification number)
- Geolokačné údaje (Geolocation data)
- Osobitné kategórie údajov (Special categories of data)

- História prístupov (Access history)
- Prieskumy spokojnosti (Customer satisfaction surveys)

- Presvedčenie o treste (Conviction record)

- Rasy a etnický pôvod (Race and ethnic origin)
- Náboženstvo alebo vyznanie (Religion or belief)

Please note that this list may not be exhaustive, and additional keywords or variations may need to be considered based on the specific circumstances involved.
expand it more please, stay within GDPR

- Právna zodpovednosť (
